query_title: Bah, Humduck!: A Looney Tunes Christmas

recommendations.title: Rabbit Fire
recommendations.overview: Daffy Duck and Bugs argue back and forth whether it is duck season or rabbit season. The object of their arguments is hunter Elmer Fudd.

recommendations.title: Mickey's Christmas Carol
recommendations.overview: Ebenezer Scrooge is far too greedy to understand that Christmas is a time for kindness and generosity. But with the guidance of some new found friends, Scrooge learns to embrace the spirit of the season. A retelling of the classic Dickens tale with D

recommendations.title: Doug's 1st Movie
recommendations.overview: Doug and his pal Skeeter set's out to find the monster of Lucky Duck Lake. Though things get really out of hand when some one blurts out that the monster is real.

recommendations.title: Rabbit Seasoning
recommendations.overview: Elmer Fudd is hunting both Daffy Duck and Bugs Bunny again.

recommendations.title: Daffy Duck's Movie: Fantastic Island
recommendations.overview: Daffy Duck and Speedy Gonzales find a treasure map that leads them to a wishing well, which for a penny will grant any wish (through old cartoon footage). Daffy sets up a resort around the well and various Looney Tunes characters have their dreams co
recommendations.director: Robert McKimson, Friz Freleng, Chuck Jones

recommendations.title: Migration
recommendations.overview: After a migrating duck family alights on their pond with thrilling tales of far-flung places, the Mallard family embarks on a family road trip, from New England, to New York City, to tropical Jamaica.

recommendations.title: Duck Amuck
recommendations.overview: The short-tempered Daffy Duck must improvise madly as the backgrounds, his costumes, the soundtrack, even his physical form, shifts and changes at the whim of the animator.

recommendations.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Enchanted Christmas
recommendations.overview: Astonished to find the Beast has a deep-seated hatred for the Christmas season, Belle endeavors to change his mind on the matter.

recommendations.title: Scrooge
recommendations.overview: A musical adaptation of Charles Dickens' classic ghost tale starring Albert Finney.

recommendations.title: Daffy Duck's Quackbusters
recommendations.overview: In this feature-length film combining footage from classic Warner Brothers cartoon shorts with newly animated bridging sequences, Daffy Duck, after having induced laughter in an ailing millionaire and forestalled the millionaire's death for a time (a
recommendations.director: Terry Lennon, Friz Freleng, Robert McKimson, Chuck Jones, Greg Ford
